description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a classic design, featuring a short, side-by-side barrel configuration and a wooden pistol grip. The barrels are metallic, likely steel, with a slightly worn, matte finish and a visible rib running between them. The receiver and trigger guard are also metallic, with the trigger guard being rounded and enclosing a double-trigger mechanism. The wooden grip and fore-end have a polished, reddish-brown appearance, showing subtle grain patterns typical of hardwood. The overall build is robust, with a break-action hinge visible at the receiver, indicating the shotgun opens for loading. The object is compact and lacks a full stock, making it suitable for close-quarters use.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a wooden pistol grip and metallic barrels, featuring a break-action design and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden pistol grip, metallic receiver, and the full length of the double barrels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the twin barrel openings and the rib between them.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, metallic receiver, and barrels, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the top of the barrels and the width of the wooden grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with a visible rib between the barrels and short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
